PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX psn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?continent ?continentLabel ?mammal ?mammalLabel ?weightValue WHERE {
  {
    SELECT ?continent(MAX(?weightVal) AS ?maxWeight) WHERE {
      ?continent wdt:P31 wd:Q515 .
      ?country wdt:P30 ?continent .
      ?mammal wdt:P31 wd:Q146 ; wdt:P367 wd:Q927416 ; wdt:P1887 ?country ; wdt:P2046 ?weightStat .
      ?weightStat psn:P2046 ?weightVal .
    }
    GROUP BY ?continent
  }
  ?continent wdt:P31 wd:Q515 .
  ?country wdt:P30 ?continent .
  ?mammal wdt:P31 wd:Q146 ; wdt:P367 wd:Q927416 ; wdt:P1887 ?country ; wdt:P2046 ?weightStat .
  ?weightStat psn:P2046 ?weightValue .
  FILTER(?weightValue = ?maxWeight)
  .
  ?mammal rdfs:label ?mammalLabel .
  ?continent rdfs:label ?continentLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?mammalLabel) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(LANG(?continentLabel) = 'en')
  .
}
